titleStmt.title: SII 27.98: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 98. (A.R. No. 525 of 1928-29.) VARĀṄGA, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the inner shrine of Nēmīśvara basti.
This record in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa languages is dated Śaka 1346, Krōdhi Pushya śu. 6, Wednesday, Makara-saṁkrānti corresponding to 1424 A.D., December 27.

It registers a gift of the village Varāṅga situated in Bārakūrunāḍu, as sarvamānya by the king to god Nēminātha of Varāṅga-tīrtha, made over to Varddhamāna-bhaṭṭāraka, for worship in the temple and for the feeding of the preceptor and his disciples samudāya. The village was formerly endowed to the same temple but certain taxes which were still being collected for the royal treasury, were now exempted. The king is referred to as Vīrapratāpa Dēvarāya, son of Vīra-Vijaya-Bukkarāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī matparama gaṁbhīra syādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁjīyātrailōkyanāthasya .
śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . mūlasaṁghē balātkāra gaṇē sārasvatābhi dēgacchē rvva guṇanidhi rjjī
yācchrī bhaṭṭāraka dēśikaḥ . bhāti bhaṭṭārakō dharma bhūṣaṇō guṇabhūṣaṇaḥ yadyaśaḥ ku
sumāmōdē gaganaṁ bhramarāyatē . tacchiṣyaru . śrī bhaṭṭāraka paṭṭabaddha mahimāvādī
bha kaṁṭhīravaḥ kāruṇyārṇnava kēmudī sahacaraḥ kaṁdarppa davvāpahaḥ kalyāṇōdaya caṁ
dranātha caraṇa dvaṁdvārdra cittasthitirddēvō dēśika varddhamāna vapuṣā jāgartti bhaṭṭārakaḥ .
śrīmaddēvēṁdra vṛṁda prakaṭatara karīṭāvalī bhānumālī līlātprōtphulla caṁcatpada kamala lasacchrīvadhū
bhī manōjñaḥ jñānāṁbhōrāsi śītadyutiramala yaśō vyāpti dikcakravālaṁ pāyācchrī dēvarāyaṁ
prabhumanavarataṁ nēmināthō jinēṁdraḥ . © svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīravijaya bukkarāya mahārāyara kumāra śrīvīra pratāpa dēvarā
ya mahārāyaru śrīmadrāya rājaguru maṁḍalācāryya mahāvādavādīśvara rāyavā
di pitāmaha sakala vidvajjana cakravartti śrīmadvarddhamāna bhaṭṭāraka dēvarugaḷige voḍavaṭṭu koṭṭa
dharmma śāsana bārakūra nāḍoḷagaṇa varāṁga tīrtthada nēminātha svāmigaḷge pūrvadalli sarvvamā
nyavāgi saluva varāṁgada grāmadalu Aramanege yattuva kuḷa modalu kāṭiya haṁneraḍu
hoṁnu Ā hanneraḍu honnina beṁbaḷiyali yattuva haṭike malavraya Adhikāri sēnabōvara
jōḍi varttane Ugrāṇi bidduṁbiya sahitavāgi yattu vaṁthā yattuvaḷi yellavanū biṭṭu
śakavarśa 1346 neya kōdhi saṁvatsarada puṣyaśuddha ṣaṣṭhiyū budhavāra makara saṁkrāṁtiya pu
ṇyakāladalu varāṁga grāmavanu Ā varāṁgada nēminātha dēvara Amṟutapaḍigū varddhamāna bhaṭṭāra
ka dēvarugaḷa samudāyadāhāradānakkeyū sarvamānyavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭu
Ā varāṁga grāmada catussīmege saluva nālku hoḷeya naḍuvaṇa gaddebeddalu tōṭe tu
ṭike hoṟadēvasva suṁkasuvarṇṇādāya nidhinikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi si
ddha sādhya Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmya samasta baḷisahavāgi sarvvamānyavāgi Ā grāmavanu
Ā caṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi naḍuva varddhamāna bhaṭṭāraka dēvarugaḷige dhārāpūrvaka
diṁ dhāreyaneṟadu barasikoṭṭa dharmmaśāsana . dēvarāya mahārāyaravoppa śrī virūpākṣa .Some space is left
© dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānādātpālanaṁ varaṁ . dānātsvargga mavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi . priyadiṁdiṁtida neyade kāyiva puruṣaṁgāyaṁ jayaśrīyu ma
kkumidaṁ kāyide kāyivapāpige kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷeḷkōṭi munīṁ
draraṁ kavileyaraṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudoṁdayasaṁ sārddapudeṁdu sāṟeda pudī śaiḷā
kṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu . naviṣaṁ viṣamityāhurdēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti
dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētunnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bha
vadbhiḥ sarvvānnētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . .
Digital edition of SII 27.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
